title: RouterAgentOutput
description: Output schema for the Router Agent. Classifies user intent and routes to the appropriate domain agent. Used in the multi-agent orchestration pipeline (Phase 5).

intent.description: Concise verb-noun phrase describing the action, e.g. 'compose_email', 'find_availability', 'search_cards'.

domain.description: The domain agent that should handle this intent.

confidence.description: Routing confidence score. Below 60 suggests ambiguous intent.

extracted_params.description: Parameters extracted from the user's command for the target domain agent.

target_entity.description: Person, event, or topic referenced in the command.

temporal_ref.description: Any date/time reference extracted from the command.

secondary_intent.description: Secondary domain if the command spans multiple intents.
